color_profiles.name: red-jasper
color_profiles.cause: Hematite (iron oxide) inclusions distributed through silica matrix.

color_profiles.name: green-jasper
color_profiles.cause: Chlorite, actinolite, or iron silicate inclusions.

color_profiles.name: picture-jasper
color_profiles.cause: Differential impurity banding and inclusion patterns creating landscape-like imagery.

color_profiles.name: ocean-jasper
color_profiles.cause: Orbicular spherulitic structure in rhyolite-hosted chalcedony/jasper.

color_profiles.name: mookaite
color_profiles.cause: Radiolarite-origin silicite with varied iron and organic impurities.

visual_notes: Opaque throughout — this is the key visual identifier. Takes a good polish showing vivid matte-to-waxy colors. Picture jasper is among the most visually complex natural stone materials.
